CREATE TABLE users (id Int32, name String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE orders (id Int32, user_id Int32, amount Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = ANY (SELECT user_id FROM orders WHERE amount > 150);
SELECT name FROM users WHERE id = ANY (SELECT user_id FROM orders WHERE amount < 100);
SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = ANY (SELECT user_id FROM (SELECT user_id FROM orders GROUP BY user_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1));
SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = ANY (SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM orders WHERE amount IN (SELECT amount FROM orders WHERE amount > 100));
SELECT name FROM users WHERE id = ANY (WITH temp AS (SELECT user_id FROM orders WHERE amount > 100) SELECT user_id FROM temp);
SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = ANY (SELECT user_id FROM orders WHERE user_id IN (1, 2) AND amount > 100);
CREATE TABLE items (item_id Int32, order_id Int32, description String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY item_id;
INSERT INTO items VALUES (1, 1, 'Item A'), (2, 2, 'Item B'), (3, 3, 'Item C');
SELECT * FROM orders WHERE user_id = ANY (SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM orders WHERE amount = (SELECT MAX(amount) FROM orders));
SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = ANY (SELECT user_id FROM orders WHERE amount = ANY (SELECT DISTINCT amount FROM orders WHERE amount > 100));
SELECT * FROM orders WHERE user_id = ANY (SELECT id FROM users WHERE name LIKE 'A%');
SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = ANY (SELECT user_id FROM (SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) as order_count FROM orders GROUP BY user_id ORDER BY order_count DESC LIMIT 5));
